remarks: THIS IS THE ONE YOU'VE BEEN WAITING FOR!  A rare new construction opportunity by Lecher Development, currently underway on a prime in-town cul-de-sac. With construction still in progress, there is time to personalize finishes and select details to match your style and preferences.  This exceptional luxury home offers 6,658 square feet of light-filled living space across four finished levels. Highlights include:  Gourmet Kitchen: A state-of-the-art kitchen featuring a large center island, premium stainless steel appliances, and an open layout that flows into the family room with a fireplace and French doors leading to a covered porch. Flexible Main-Level Living: The first floor includes a private room that can serve as a home office or sixth bedroom, complete with an adjacent full bath. Finished Third Floor: Ideal for a second office, playroom, guest suite, or au pair quarters. Spacious Lower Level: Featuring 10-foot ceilings, perfect for a gym, media room, playroom, or additional recreation space. Generous Ceiling Heights: 9-foot ceilings on the main and second floors enhance the home's open, airy feel.  Additional amenities include a 24-kW generator, five-zone heating and cooling, natural gas, and town water.  Set on a level property with a designated pool site, this home combines luxury, comfort, and customization in an unbeatable location. Don't miss the opportunity to make this exceptional property your dream home. Measurements & specs are approximate & sub
